title: Improving DRL Policies via Explainable Action Correction Based on Accident Cause Analysis
authors: Tenta Suzuki, Mao Tobisawa, Clive Jancen Kawaoto, Kaito Kumagae, Yuki Itoh, Kenji Matsuda, Junya Hoshino, Tomohiro Harada, Johei Matsuoka and Kiyohiko Hattori.
venue: Proceedings of the 9th International Symposium on Swarm Behavior and Bio-Inspired Robotics 2025 (SWARM2025)
